# Select

Lets a user choose one option from a native menu.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/select
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="select"
  example={0}
  code={`<Select aria-label="Status"><option>Draft</option><option>Published</option></Select>`}
/>

```tsx
<Select aria-label="Status">
  <option>Draft</option>
  <option>Published</option>
</Select>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="select"
  example={1}
  code={`<Select invalid aria-label="Status"><option>Choose a status</option></Select>`}
/>

```tsx
<Select invalid aria-label="Status">
  <option>Choose a status</option>
</Select>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="select"
  example={2}
  code={`<Select disabled aria-label="Disabled select"><option>Disabled</option></Select>`}
/>

```tsx
<Select disabled aria-label="Disabled select">
  <option>Disabled</option>
</Select>
```

## Props

| Prop      | Type         | Required | Default | Description |
| --------- | ------------ | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `invalid` | `boolean`    | No       | -       | -           |
| `size`    | `SelectSize` | No       | -       | -           |

## Variants

| Variant   | Values           |
| --------- | ---------------- |
| `invalid` | `true`           |
| `size`    | `sm`, `md`, `lg` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/select.json`
- Recipe: `select`
- Files: `src/components/ui/select.tsx`
